overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Silver (ZSL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones-UBS Silver Sub-Index index. The fund provides -2x the daily performance of silver, as measured by the price of COMEX silver futures contracts. ZSL was launched on Dec 1, 2008 and is issued by ProShares.
